data.title: Warren Buffett's Fund Manager Didn't Want Anyone To Know He Turned $70,000 Into $264M, 'But Now That The Number Is Out There...'
data.description: Warren Buffett is considered one of the greatest investors of all time. He also appears to be one of the greatest teachers of all time, given the massive returns generated by one of his portfolio managers.

data.title: Trump's 10% Tariff On Most Imports Is Finally Here, Taking Effect Saturday
data.description: President Trump's 10% baseline tariffs on most U.S. imports took effect on Saturday.

data.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX, Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin, And Boeing-Lockheed's ULA Bag $13.5 Billion Pentagon Launch Contracts
data.description: Space companies SpaceX, Blue Origin, Boeing, and Lockheed Martin have been awarded $13.5 billion contracts by the U.S. Space Force to launch critical satellites by 2029.

data.title: Cathie Wood Weighs In On Trump's 'Tariff Turmoil' And Potential Economic Impact: 'If President Trump Cares About His Legacy…'
data.description: Cathie Wood, CEO of Ark Invest, warned that President Trump's new tariffs could push the U.S. into a recession but remained hopeful that innovation and strategic policies could lead to a recovery.

data.title: Bill Gates, Satya Nadella, And Steve Ballmer Get Roasted By Microsoft's AI Copilot: 'Let's Spice It Up'
data.description: During Microsoft's 50th anniversary celebration, AI Copilot humorously roasted CEOs Bill Gates, Satya Nadella, and Steve Ballmer.
